_comment: Copy the hooks you want into your project's .claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key

PostToolUse.description: Run lint and type check after file edits
Check for uncommitted changes after bash commands

TeammateIdle.description: Verify teammate completed their work before going idle

TaskCompleted.description: Validate task completion against acceptance criteria

Stop.description: Prevent premature completion — verify tests pass before stopping
